headline: DaVita’s Strong Operations Confront Debt Warning And Insider Selling Signals
summary: DaVita (NYSE:DVA) reports strong operational performance with solid revenue growth and expanding margins. The company now faces early warning signals, including a distress-level Altman Z-Score that flags potential financial risk. Recent insider selling activity at DaVita adds another layer of concern for investors tracking internal confidence. DaVita, a major provider of kidney care services, sits at the intersection of aging demographics, chronic disease trends and ongoing pressure on...
